# ASAuthorizationProviderExtensionKeyType.userDeviceEncryption

**Case**

The user device encryption key.

## Declaration

```swift
case userDeviceEncryption
```

## Identifying the key types

- **ASAuthorizationProviderExtensionKeyType.userDeviceSigning**: The user device signing key.
- **ASAuthorizationProviderExtensionKeyType.userSecureEnclaveKey**: The user Secure Enclave key.
title: ASAuthorizationProviderExtensionKeyType.userDeviceEncryption
